items.title: Ex-reality TV star Holmes repeats Iditarod win
items.dek: Former reality TV star Jessie Holmes cruised to a victory in the Iditarod, becoming the third competitor in the 54-year history of the race to repeat the year a
items.body: Former reality TV star Jessie Holmes cruised to a victory in the Iditarod, becoming the third competitor in the 54-year history of the race to repeat the year after winning for the first time.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: The US Navy decommissioned Middle East minesweepers last year. Here’s what they did.
items.dek: Unbelievably, the USN recently decommissioned all of the old wooden hulled minesweepers in the middle east and is replacing them with unproven LCS. Four Avenger
items.body: Unbelievably, the USN recently decommissioned all of the old wooden hulled minesweepers in the middle east and is replacing them with unproven LCS. Four Avenger Class minesweepers depart Bahrain for disposal. USS Devastator, USS Dextrous, USS Gladiator, and USS Sentry. submitted by /u/jasandliz [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk
